input.content:
================================================================================
                    PROJECT MANAGEMENT TOOL - VERSION 2.0
                              RELEASE NOTES
================================================================================

Release Date: [Date]
Version: 2.0.0

================================================================================
OVERVIEW
================================================================================

We're excited to announce the release of Project Management Tool v2.0! This major
release brings significant improvements to performance, usability, and functionality.
We've listened to your feedback and implemented numerous enhancements to make
project management more intuitive and powerful than ever.

================================================================================
NEW FEATURES
================================================================================

1. ADVANCED FILTERING & SEARCH
   - Powerful new search functionality across all project data
   - Save and reuse custom filters for frequently used searches
   - Full-text search support for tasks, notes, and comments
   - Filter by multiple criteria simultaneously

2. TEAM COLLABORATION ENHANCEMENTS
   - Real-time collaboration with live presence indicators
   - @mention functionality for direct team communication
   - Comment threads with nested replies
   - Activity feed showing real-time project updates

3. CUSTOM DASHBOARDS
   - Create personalized project dashboards
   - Drag-and-drop widget arrangement
   - Multiple dashboard support per user
   - Template library with pre-built dashboards

4. ADVANCED REPORTING
   - Generate comprehensive project reports (PDF, Excel, CSV)
   - Customizable report templates
   - Automated report scheduling and email delivery
   - Data visualization with charts and graphs

5. TIME TRACKING & ESTIMATION
   - Built-in time tracking for tasks
   - Automatic billable hours calculation
   - Time estimation and actual vs. estimated comparison
   - Time entry approval workflow

6. INTEGRATIONS FRAMEWORK
   - Webhook support for external integrations
   - Native integrations with popular tools (Slack, Microsoft Teams, Jira)
   - API v2 for custom integrations
   - OAuth 2.0 authentication support

7. RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
   - Team capacity planning and workload visualization
   - Resource allocation across projects
   - Skills-based resource matching
   - Availability calendar and scheduling

================================================================================
IMPROVEMENTS
================================================================================

PERFORMANCE & RELIABILITY
   - 40% improvement in application load time
   - Enhanced caching mechanisms for faster data retrieval
   - Optimized database queries for large datasets
   - Improved mobile app performance

USER INTERFACE & EXPERIENCE
   - Modern, redesigned user interface with improved usability
   - Dark mode support across the entire application
   - Responsive design for better mobile experience
   - Keyboard shortcuts and accessibility improvements
   - Customizable sidebar and navigation

TASK & PROJECT MANAGEMENT
   - Improved task hierarchy and dependencies
   - Bulk operations for faster task management
   - Enhanced priority and status management
   - Better milestone and release management

NOTIFICATIONS & ALERTS
   - Intelligent notification system to reduce noise
   - Customizable notification preferences
   - Smart notification scheduling
   - Digest emails for daily/weekly summaries

DOCUMENTATION & HELP
   - Comprehensive in-app guided tours
   - Improved help documentation
   - Video tutorials for key features
   - Contextual help system

SECURITY & COMPLIANCE
   - Enhanced encryption for data in transit and at rest
   - Two-factor authentication (2FA) support
   - Improved role-based access control (RBAC)
   - Audit logging for compliance tracking
   - GDPR compliance improvements

================================================================================
BUG FIXES
================================================================================

   - Fixed issue where task comments were not syncing across devices
   - Resolved problem with duplicate tasks appearing in project views
   - Fixed calendar view display issues for all-day events
   - Corrected calculation of project completion percentages
   - Fixed file upload failures for large attachments (>500MB)
   - Resolved issue where user permissions were not updating immediately
   - Fixed dashboard widgets not refreshing real-time data
   - Corrected timezone handling in date/time fields
   - Fixed issue with bulk editing affecting wrong tasks
   - Resolved memory leak causing performance degradation
   - Fixed notification delivery failures for certain user groups
   - Corrected CSV export formatting issues
   - Fixed sorting inconsistencies in task lists
   - Resolved issue where archived projects appeared in active project lists
   - Fixed email template rendering on certain email clients
   - Corrected calculation of overdue tasks in reports
   - Fixed UI freezing when opening large projects
   - Resolved issue with auto-save not working for team members
   - Fixed search results not showing all matching items
   - Corrected API response formatting for consistency

================================================================================
BREAKING CHANGES
================================================================================

   - Deprecated v1 API endpoints. Please migrate to API v2.
     (Deprecation timeline: v1 API will be disabled on [Date])
   - Password authentication with special characters requires reset
   - Old dashboard templates are no longer supported
   - Team role "Project Viewer" has been merged into "Team Member"

================================================================================
KNOWN ISSUES
================================================================================

   - Time tracking may show slight discrepancies when clocks are synced
   - Custom integrations using legacy webhooks require updating to v2 format
   - Reporting with very large datasets (>100k records) may experience delays
   - Dark mode theme has minor display issues in Internet Explorer 11

================================================================================
MIGRATION GUIDE
================================================================================

Upgrading from v1.x:

1. Backup your data before upgrading
2. Clear your browser cache for best performance
3. Update any custom integrations to use API v2
4. Review and update team member permissions
5. Recreate custom dashboards using the new dashboard builder

For detailed migration instructions, visit: [documentation link]

================================================================================
SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
================================================================================

Minimum Requirements:
   - Browser: Chrome 90+, Firefox 88+, Safari 14+, Edge 90+
   - Operating System: Windows 10+, macOS 10.15+, Ubuntu 20.04+
   - RAM: 4GB minimum
   - Storage: 500MB available space

Recommended Requirements:
   - Browser: Latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge
   - Operating System: Windows 11, macOS 12+, Ubuntu 22.04+
   - RAM: 8GB or higher
   - Storage: 1GB available space

================================================================================
THANK YOU
================================================================================

We want to extend our gratitude to all our users and community members who
provided feedback and suggestions that shaped this release. Your input helps
us create a better product.

For questions, support, or feedback, please contact:
   - Email: support@projectmanagementsoftware.com
   - Community Forum: https://community.projectmanagementsoftware.com
   - GitHub Issues: https://github.com/project-management-tool/issues

================================================================================
